title: Run a retrieval recall evaluation
description: Execute or scaffold an evaluation over a labeled query set that measures recall, rerank precision, and grounding rate.
body: Use when validating a retrieval or chunking change. Procedure: take a labeled query-passage set, run queries through the pipeline, measure first-stage recall and post-rerank precision against the labels, and compute the grounding rate of answers; if such an eval is absent, scaffold the minimal labeled set. Report recall, precision, and grounding before and after the change, and attribute regressions to a stage. This skill exposes capability only and must not run against production data without permission. Risk boundary: a retrieval change without a recall comparison is unverified and must not be reported as an improvement.
